metadata.description: Research plugins for evidence-grounded life sciences, psychology, therapy, and provider-fit workflows.

plugins.name: bio-research
plugins.description: Investigate biological targets, map protein interactions, and evaluate drug candidates using 12 curated life sciences APIs. Generate evidence-graded reports and BioRxiv-ready manuscripts from a single research question.

plugins.name: psychology-research
plugins.description: Run evidence-grounded psychology research and therapist/provider fit assessment with source hierarchy, claim provenance, clinical-safety guardrails, and evidence-graded reporting.
